query:
SELECT l.projeto, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(CAST(c.valorVenda AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
WHERE c.distrato = 0 AND l.projeto IS NOT NULL AND l.projeto != ''
GROUP BY l.projeto
ORDER BY contratos DESC
LIMIT 10;
